title: FLUX 3 - Real World Models: Towards Multimodal Flow Models as the Backbone of Visual Intelligence.
excerpt: FLUX 3, our new multimodal frontier model, jointly learns from images, video, and audio to build one representation of the world. Now available in Early Access.
content_html:
FLUX 3 is now available in Early Access.

FLUX 3 is our new multimodal foundation model. It jointly learns from images, videos, and audio within a unified architecture, because what it needs to learn is not any one of these elements in isolation. Instead, a model must learn a representation of the world: how objects hold together, how things move, and how events sound.

No single modality provides a complete description. Each is a projection of the same underlying reality, captured by different sensors, each of which loses some information in the process. Images capture spatial structures and relationships at a specific point in time. Videos restore the dimension of time and reveal temporal dynamics and physical laws. Audio reveals causal relationships between mechanical phenomena and acoustics that vision alone cannot detect. Language links these perceptions to goals, abstractions, and instructions.

Learn from one and you get a good model of that projection. Learn from all of them at once and their mutual constraints tell you more: the sound has to match the impact, the motion has to obey the mass, the future has to follow from the past. The modalities stop being separate and start being evidence about one underlying reality.

FLUX 3 is our first model built entirely on that principle, and a checkpoint on our mission to develop real-world visual intelligence: models that perceive, predict, and act across physical and digital environments. Early results in content creation and physical AI suggest it is the right path.

FLUX 3: One model, multiple capabilities.

FLUX 3 builds on Self-Flow, our approach for efficiently aligning multimodal generation and understanding within the same underlying architecture. Based on this approach, we significantly scaled up compute and data resources to train FLUX 3 across video, images, and audio at the same time.

Self-Flow vs. Flow Matching (FM). Left: generation error (Fréchet distance) per modality, each normalized to FM = 100 (lower is better). Right: success rate on manipulation tasks averaged over four task groups through finetuning (higher is better).

Capabilities & Early Evaluations

As a result, FLUX 3 is capable of mixing modalities and generating images and video+audio jointly; both from pure text prompts as well as when providing input references such as images and video. We are highlighting a few of the model’s key capabilities below.

Video

FLUX 3 can create highly diverse videos with audio up to 20 seconds in length in a single generation.

Its core capabilities include the following (all outputs come with native audio generation):

  • Text-to-video generation.
  • Image-to-video generation, either continuing from a starting frame (“animation”) or using images as visual references.
  • Video-to-video generation from a reference clip, carrying central elements of a source video - for instance the same character - into a new scene or context.
  • Generative video-audio continuation from input video and audio.
  • Keyframe-to-video generation for controlled transitions between defined moments.
  • Multilingual dialogue.
  • A broad range of visual styles and aspect ratios, extending far beyond conventional cinematic output.
  • Agentic chaining of individual clips into longer, multi-shot sequences.
  • High style diversity -- FLUX 3 Video easily handles ranges of styles from candid camcorder footage to animation and cinematics.
  • Strong typography generation and animated designs.

For the preliminary analysis below, we generated 10-second text-to-video clips in 720p with audio.

Evaluations are early and we expect further improvements

As the model and the harness around it are still in development, these results are preliminary, and we expect further improvements during the early access phase. Across early evaluations, FLUX 3 was preferred over Grok Imagine Video in up to 69% of comparisons, Kling v3 Pro in 60%, Happy Horse v1 in 59%, Happy Horse 1.1 in 57%, Seedance 2.0 and Gemini Omni Flash in 52%. FLUX 3 was preferred over Runway Gen-4.5 in 77% of comparisons and over Luma Ray 3.2 in 93% of comparisons.

While still in development, FLUX 3 Video is already particularly strong in capturing human facial expressions, associating sounds with physical events, and multilingual capabilities. Furthermore, these capabilities can be combined to create sequences lasting several minutes, where visual references help ensure that the characters remain consistent across all scenes.

FLUX 3 Video is now available in Early Access here

Image

FLUX 3 can synthesize and edit images in a wide variety of styles, aspect ratios, and resolutions. In preliminary evaluations conducted during midtraining, FLUX 3 already shows a significant improvement over earlier versions of FLUX: its ability to handle complex prompts and text generation has improved significantly. The model produces a wide range of output styles (see the following samples), and is able to render high-accuracy text in multiple languages.

As with video evaluations, these are preliminary results, and we expect further improvements before release. We will open up an early access phase for FLUX 3 Image in the following weeks.

Action

FLUX 3's world understanding extends to action prediction. We have taken two routes to it: integrating native action prediction into FLUX 3 directly, scaling up our initial work in Self-Flow; and using the pretrained video backbone as a dynamics-aware foundation that specialized action models can be finetuned from with limited task-specific data.

For the second, mimic robotics was one of the first partners to gain early access to FLUX 3. Together we developed FLUX-mimic, a video-action model combining the FLUX 3 backbone with mimic's expertise in robot learning for dexterous manipulation and production deployment. Read our thesis on why physical AI and content creation run on the same foundation, and how it's being tested on real production tasks at Audi.

Launch Plan

Over the next few weeks and months, we will make the following capabilities available, each after an early access phase for ensuring smooth rollout, collecting feedback and rigorous safety-testing. All capabilities are built from the same underlying multimodal flow matching model. These capabilities and models include:

  • Video and audio generation and editing through APIs and private weight access. (“FLUX 3 Video”)
  • Action prediction through selected research and commercial partners, beginning with mimic robotics (“FLUX-mimic and FLUX 3 Action”)
  • Image synthesis and editing through APIs and private weight access. (“FLUX 3 Image”)
  • Open-weight access to a multimodal backbone, for content creation (video, audio and image) and action prediction. (“FLUX 3 Dev”)

We will also release more technical details on the underlying approach.

Request early access here

What’s next?

We are only beginning to scratch the surface of versatile, capable, unified multimodal models, and what they will enable. From interactive image & video editing, simulation to computer use and physical AI, the frontier is wide open. While we gradually roll out these new capabilities, we are already working on the next generation models. Our goal is to unify perceptual, action and language prediction in the same unified model.

If you are interested in exploring and building with FLUX 3, get in touch here. If you are interested in contributing to our mission, join us! We are hiring in Germany and the US.

blocks.html_en: FLUX 3 is now available in Early Access.

sentences.en: FLUX 3 is now available in Early Access.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 现已推出抢先体验版。

blocks.html_en: FLUX 3 is our new multimodal foundation model. It jointly learns from images, videos, and audio within a unified architecture, because what it needs to learn is not any one of these elements in isolation. Instead, a model must learn a representation of the world: how objects hold together, how things move, and how events sound.

sentences.en: FLUX 3 is our new multimodal foundation model.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 是我们新的多模式基础模型。

sentences.en: It jointly learns from images, videos, and audio within a unified architecture, because what it needs to learn is not any one of these elements in isolation.
sentences.zh: 它在统一的架构中共同学习图像、视频和音频，因为它需要学习的不是这些孤立的元素中的任何一个。

sentences.en: Instead, a model must learn a representation of the world: how objects hold together, how things move, and how events sound.
sentences.zh: 相反，模型必须学习世界的表示：物体如何结合在一起、物体如何移动以及事件如何发声。

blocks.html_en: No single modality provides a complete description. Each is a projection of the same underlying reality, captured by different sensors, each of which loses some information in the process. Images capture spatial structures and relationships at a specific point in time. Videos restore the dimension of time and reveal temporal dynamics and physical laws. Audio reveals causal relationships between mechanical phenomena and acoustics that vision alone cannot detect. Language links these perceptions to goals, abstractions, and instructions.

sentences.en: No single modality provides a complete description.
sentences.zh: 没有任何一种单一模式可以提供完整的描述。

sentences.en: Each is a projection of the same underlying reality, captured by different sensors, each of which loses some information in the process.
sentences.zh: 每一个都是同一底层现实的投影，由不同的传感器捕获，每个传感器在这个过程中都会丢失一些信息。

sentences.en: Images capture spatial structures and relationships at a specific point in time.
sentences.zh: 图像捕捉特定时间点的空间结构和关系。

sentences.en: Videos restore the dimension of time and reveal temporal dynamics and physical laws.
sentences.zh: 视频还原了时间的维度，揭示了时间动态和物理定律。

sentences.en: Audio reveals causal relationships between mechanical phenomena and acoustics that vision alone cannot detect.
sentences.zh: 音频揭示了仅靠视觉无法检测到的机械现象和声学之间的因果关系。

sentences.en: Language links these perceptions to goals, abstractions, and instructions.
sentences.zh: 语言将这些感知与目标、抽象和指令联系起来。

blocks.html_en: Learn from one and you get a good model of that projection. Learn from all of them at once and their mutual constraints tell you more: the sound has to match the impact, the motion has to obey the mass, the future has to follow from the past. The modalities stop being separate and start being evidence about one underlying reality.

sentences.en: Learn from one and you get a good model of that projection.
sentences.zh: 向其中学习，你就会得到一个很好的预测模型。

sentences.en: Learn from all of them at once and their mutual constraints tell you more: the sound has to match the impact, the motion has to obey the mass, the future has to follow from the past.
sentences.zh: 立即向他们所有人学习，他们的相互制约告诉你更多：声音必须与影响相匹配，运动必须服从质量，未来必须遵循过去。

sentences.en: The modalities stop being separate and start being evidence about one underlying reality.
sentences.zh: 这些模式不再是分离的，而是开始成为一个潜在现实的证据。

blocks.html_en: FLUX 3 is our first model built entirely on that principle, and a checkpoint on our mission to develop real-world visual intelligence: models that perceive, predict, and act across physical and digital environments. Early results in content creation and physical AI suggest it is the right path.

sentences.en: FLUX 3 is our first model built entirely on that principle, and a checkpoint on our mission to develop real-world visual intelligence: models that perceive, predict, and act across physical and digital environments.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 是我们第一个完全基于该原则构建的模型，也是我们开发现实世界视觉智能使命的一个检查点：在物理和数字环境中感知、预测和行动的模型。

sentences.en: Early results in content creation and physical AI suggest it is the right path.
sentences.zh: 内容创建和物理人工智能的早期结果表明这是正确的道路。

blocks.html_en: FLUX 3: One model, multiple capabilities.

sentences.en: FLUX 3: One model, multiple capabilities.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3：一种型号，多种功能。

blocks.html_en: FLUX 3 builds on Self-Flow, our approach for efficiently aligning multimodal generation and understanding within the same underlying architecture. Based on this approach, we significantly scaled up compute and data resources to train FLUX 3 across video, images, and audio at the same time.

sentences.en: FLUX 3 builds on Self-Flow, our approach for efficiently aligning multimodal generation and understanding within the same underlying architecture.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 基于 Self-Flow 构建，这是我们在同一底层架构中有效协调多模式生成和理解的方法。

sentences.en: Based on this approach, we significantly scaled up compute and data resources to train FLUX 3 across video, images, and audio at the same time.
sentences.zh: 基于这种方法，我们显着扩展了计算和数据资源，以同时跨视频、图像和音频训练 FLUX 3。

blocks.html_en: Self-Flow vs. Flow Matching (FM). Left: generation error (Fréchet distance) per modality, each normalized to FM = 100 (lower is better). Right: success rate on manipulation tasks averaged over four task groups through finetuning (higher is better).

sentences.en: Self-Flow vs. Flow Matching (FM).
sentences.zh: 自流与流量匹配 (FM)。

sentences.en: Left: generation error (Fréchet distance) per modality, each normalized to FM = 100 (lower is better).
sentences.zh: 左：每种模态的生成误差（Fréchet 距离），每个都标准化为 FM = 100（越低越好）。

sentences.en: Right: success rate on manipulation tasks averaged over four task groups through finetuning (higher is better).
sentences.zh: 右图：通过微调，四个任务组的平均操作任务成功率（越高越好）。

blocks.html_en: Capabilities & Early Evaluations

sentences.en: Capabilities & Early Evaluations
sentences.zh: 能力和早期评估

sentences.en: As a result, FLUX 3 is capable of mixing modalities and generating images and video+audio jointly; both from pure text prompts as well as when providing input references such as images and video.

sentences.en: We are highlighting a few of the model’s key capabilities below.
sentences.zh: 我们在下面重点介绍该模型的一些关键功能。

blocks.html_en: Video
FLUX 3 can create highly diverse videos with audio up to 20 seconds in length in a single generation.

sentences.en: FLUX 3 can create highly diverse videos with audio up to 20 seconds in length in a single generation.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 可以在一次生成中创建高度多样化的视频，音频长度可达 20 秒。

blocks.html_en: Its core capabilities include the following (all outputs come with native audio generation):

sentences.en: Its core capabilities include the following (all outputs come with native audio generation):
sentences.zh: 其核心功能包括以下内容（所有输出均带有本机音频生成）：

blocks.html_en: • Text-to-video generation.

sentences.en: Text-to-video generation.
sentences.zh: 文本到视频的生成。

blocks.html_en: • Image-to-video generation, either continuing from a starting frame (“animation”) or using images as visual references.

sentences.en: Image-to-video generation, either continuing from a starting frame (“animation”) or using images as visual references.
sentences.zh: 图像到视频的生成，要么从起始帧（“动画”）继续，要么使用图像作为视觉参考。

blocks.html_en: • Video-to-video generation from a reference clip, carrying central elements of a source video - for instance the same character - into a new scene or context.

sentences.en: Video-to-video generation from a reference clip, carrying central elements of a source video - for instance the same character - into a new scene or context.
sentences.zh: 从参考剪辑生成视频到视频，将源视频的中心元素（例如相同的角色）携带到新的场景或上下文中。

blocks.html_en: • Generative video-audio continuation from input video and audio.

sentences.en: Generative video-audio continuation from input video and audio.
sentences.zh: 从输入视频和音频生成视频音频延续。

blocks.html_en: • Keyframe-to-video generation for controlled transitions between defined moments.

sentences.en: Keyframe-to-video generation for controlled transitions between defined moments.
sentences.zh: 关键帧到视频的生成，用于定义时刻之间的受控过渡。

blocks.html_en: • Multilingual dialogue.

sentences.en: Multilingual dialogue.
sentences.zh: 多语言对话。

blocks.html_en: • A broad range of visual styles and aspect ratios, extending far beyond conventional cinematic output.

sentences.en: A broad range of visual styles and aspect ratios, extending far beyond conventional cinematic output.
sentences.zh: 广泛的视觉风格和宽高比，远远超出了传统的电影输出。

blocks.html_en: • Agentic chaining of individual clips into longer, multi-shot sequences.

sentences.en: Agentic chaining of individual clips into longer, multi-shot sequences.
sentences.zh: 将单个剪辑代理链接成更长的多镜头序列。

blocks.html_en: • High style diversity -- FLUX 3 Video easily handles ranges of styles from candid camcorder footage to animation and cinematics.

sentences.en: High style diversity -- FLUX 3 Video easily handles ranges of styles from candid camcorder footage to animation and cinematics.
sentences.zh: 高风格多样性——FLUX 3 Video 可以轻松处理从偷拍摄像机镜头到动画和电影的各种风格。

blocks.html_en: • Strong typography generation and animated designs.

sentences.en: Strong typography generation and animated designs.
sentences.zh: 强大的排版生成和动画设计。

blocks.html_en: For the preliminary analysis below, we generated 10-second text-to-video clips in 720p with audio.

sentences.en: For the preliminary analysis below, we generated 10-second text-to-video clips in 720p with audio.

blocks.html_en: Image

FLUX 3 can synthesize and edit images in a wide variety of styles, aspect ratios, and resolutions. In preliminary evaluations conducted during midtraining, FLUX 3 already shows a significant improvement over earlier versions of FLUX: its ability to handle complex prompts and text generation has improved significantly. The model produces a wide range of output styles (see the following samples), and is able to render high-accuracy text in multiple languages.

sentences.en: FLUX 3 can synthesize and edit images in a wide variety of styles, aspect ratios, and resolutions.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 可以合成和编辑各种风格、长宽比和分辨率的图像。

sentences.en: In preliminary evaluations conducted during midtraining, FLUX 3 already shows a significant improvement over earlier versions of FLUX: its ability to handle complex prompts and text generation has improved significantly.
sentences.zh: 在训练中期进行的初步评估中，FLUX 3 已经显示出相对于早期版本的 FLUX 的显着改进：其处理复杂提示和文本生成的能力显着提高。

sentences.en: The model produces a wide range of output styles (see the following samples), and is able to render high-accuracy text in multiple languages.
sentences.zh: 该模型产生多种输出样式（请参阅以下示例），并且能够以多种语言呈现高精度文本。

blocks.html_en: As with video evaluations, these are preliminary results, and we expect further improvements before release. We will open up an early access phase for FLUX 3 Image in the following weeks.

sentences.en: As with video evaluations, these are preliminary results, and we expect further improvements before release.
sentences.zh: 与视频评估一样，这些都是初步结果，我们预计在发布之前会有进一步的改进。

sentences.en: We will open up an early access phase for FLUX 3 Image in the following weeks.
sentences.zh: 我们将在接下来的几周内开放 FLUX 3 Image 的抢先体验阶段。

blocks.html_en: Action

sentences.en: Action
sentences.zh: 行动

blocks.html_en: FLUX 3's world understanding extends to action prediction. We have taken two routes to it: integrating native action prediction into FLUX 3 directly, scaling up our initial work in Self-Flow; and using the pretrained video backbone as a dynamics-aware foundation that specialized action models can be finetuned from with limited task-specific data.

sentences.en: FLUX 3's world understanding extends to action prediction.
sentences.zh: FLUX 3 的世界理解延伸到了动作预测。

sentences.en: We have taken two routes to it: integrating native action prediction into FLUX 3 directly, scaling up our initial work in Self-Flow; and using the pretrained video backbone as a dynamics-aware foundation that specialized action models can be finetuned from with limited task-specific data.
sentences.zh: 我们采取了两条路线：将原生动作预测直接集成到 FLUX 3 中，扩大我们在 Self-Flow 中的初始工作；并使用预训练的视频主干作为动态感知的基础，可以使用有限的特定于任务的数据来微调专门的动作模型。

blocks.html_en: For the second, mimic robotics was one of the first partners to gain early access to FLUX 3. Together we developed FLUX-mimic, a video-action model combining the FLUX 3 backbone with mimic's expertise in robot learning for dexterous manipulation and production deployment. Read our thesis on why physical AI and content creation run on the same foundation, and how it's being tested on real production tasks at Audi.

sentences.en: For the second, mimic robotics was one of the first partners to gain early access to FLUX 3.
sentences.zh: 其次，模仿机器人是最早获得 FLUX 3 早期使用权的合作伙伴之一。

sentences.en: Together we developed FLUX-mimic, a video-action model combining the FLUX 3 backbone with mimic's expertise in robot learning for dexterous manipulation and production deployment.
sentences.zh: 我们共同开发了 FLUX-mimic，这是一种视频动作模型，将 FLUX 3 骨干与 mimic 在机器人学习方面的专业知识相结合，以实现灵巧的操作和生产部署。

sentences.en: Read our thesis on why physical AI and content creation run on the same foundation, and how it's being tested on real production tasks at Audi.
sentences.zh: 阅读我们的论文，了解为什么物理人工智能和内容创建在同一基础上运行，以及如何在奥迪的实际生产任务中对其进行测试。

blocks.html_en: Launch Plan

sentences.en: Launch Plan
sentences.zh: 推出计划

blocks.html_en: Over the next few weeks and months, we will make the following capabilities available, each after an early access phase for ensuring smooth rollout, collecting feedback and rigorous safety-testing. All capabilities are built from the same underlying multimodal flow matching model. These capabilities and models include:

sentences.en: Over the next few weeks and months, we will make the following capabilities available, each after an early access phase for ensuring smooth rollout, collecting feedback and rigorous safety-testing.
sentences.zh: 在接下来的几周和几个月内，我们将在早期访问阶段之后提供以下功能，以确保顺利推出、收集反馈和严格的安全测试。

sentences.en: All capabilities are built from the same underlying multimodal flow matching model.
sentences.zh: 所有功能均基于相同的底层多模式流量匹配模型构建。

sentences.en: These capabilities and models include:
sentences.zh: 这些功能和模型包括：

blocks.html_en: • Video and audio generation and editing through APIs and private weight access. (“FLUX 3 Video”)

sentences.en: Video and audio generation and editing through APIs and private weight access.
sentences.zh: 通过 API 和私人权重访问生成和编辑视频和音频。

sentences.en: (“FLUX 3 Video”)
sentences.zh: （“FLUX 3 视频”）

blocks.html_en: • Action prediction through selected research and commercial partners, beginning with mimic robotics (“FLUX-mimic and FLUX 3 Action”)

sentences.en: Action prediction through selected research and commercial partners, beginning with mimic robotics (“FLUX-mimic and FLUX 3 Action”)
sentences.zh: 通过选定的研究和商业合作伙伴进行动作预测，从模仿机器人开始（“FLUX-mimic 和 FLUX 3 Action”）

blocks.html_en: • Image synthesis and editing through APIs and private weight access. (“FLUX 3 Image”)

sentences.en: Image synthesis and editing through APIs and private weight access.
sentences.zh: 通过 API 和私有权重访问进行图像合成和编辑。

sentences.en: (“FLUX 3 Image”)
sentences.zh: （“FLUX 3 图像”）

blocks.html_en: • Open-weight access to a multimodal backbone, for content creation (video, audio and image) and action prediction. (“FLUX 3 Dev”)

sentences.en: Open-weight access to a multimodal backbone, for content creation (video, audio and image) and action prediction.
sentences.zh: 对多模式骨干网的开放权重访问，用于内容创建（视频、音频和图像）和动作预测。

sentences.en: (“FLUX 3 Dev”)
sentences.zh: （“FLUX 3 开发”）

blocks.html_en: We will also release more technical details on the underlying approach.

sentences.en: We will also release more technical details on the underlying approach.
sentences.zh: 我们还将发布有关底层方法的更多技术细节。

blocks.html_en: Request early access here

sentences.en: Request early access here
sentences.zh: 在此请求提前访问

blocks.html_en: What’s next?

sentences.en: What’s next?
sentences.zh: 接下来是什么？

blocks.html_en: We are only beginning to scratch the surface of versatile, capable, unified multimodal models, and what they will enable. From interactive image & video editing, simulation to computer use and physical AI, the frontier is wide open. While we gradually roll out these new capabilities, we are already working on the next generation models. Our goal is to unify perceptual, action and language prediction in the same unified model.

sentences.en: We are only beginning to scratch the surface of versatile, capable, unified multimodal models, and what they will enable.
sentences.zh: 我们才刚刚开始触及多功能、强大、统一的多式联运模型及其功能的表面。

sentences.en: From interactive image & video editing, simulation to computer use and physical AI, the frontier is wide open.
sentences.zh: 从交互式图像和视频编辑、模拟到计算机使用和物理人工智能，前沿是广阔的。

sentences.en: While we gradually roll out these new capabilities, we are already working on the next generation models.
sentences.zh: 在我们逐步推出这些新功能的同时，我们已经在开发下一代模型。

sentences.en: Our goal is to unify perceptual, action and language prediction in the same unified model.
sentences.zh: 我们的目标是将感知、动作和语言预测统一在同一个统一模型中。

blocks.html_en: If you are interested in exploring and building with FLUX 3, get in touch here. If you are interested in contributing to our mission, join us! We are hiring in Germany and the US.

sentences.en: If you are interested in exploring and building with FLUX 3, get in touch here.
sentences.zh: 如果您有兴趣使用 FLUX 3 进行探索和构建，请在此处联系。

sentences.en: If you are interested in contributing to our mission, join us!
sentences.zh: 如果您有兴趣为我们的使命做出贡献，请加入我们！

sentences.en: We are hiring in Germany and the US.
sentences.zh: 我们正在德国和美国招聘。

content_html_zh:
FLUX 3 现已推出抢先体验版。

FLUX 3 是我们新的多模式基础模型。 它在统一的架构中共同学习图像、视频和音频，因为它需要学习的不是这些孤立的元素中的任何一个。 相反，模型必须学习世界的表示：物体如何结合在一起、物体如何移动以及事件如何发声。

没有任何一种单一模式可以提供完整的描述。 每一个都是同一底层现实的投影，由不同的传感器捕获，每个传感器在这个过程中都会丢失一些信息。 图像捕捉特定时间点的空间结构和关系。 视频还原了时间的维度，揭示了时间动态和物理定律。 音频揭示了仅靠视觉无法检测到的机械现象和声学之间的因果关系。 语言将这些感知与目标、抽象和指令联系起来。

向其中学习，你就会得到一个很好的预测模型。 立即向他们所有人学习，他们的相互制约告诉你更多：声音必须与影响相匹配，运动必须服从质量，未来必须遵循过去。 这些模式不再是分离的，而是开始成为一个潜在现实的证据。

FLUX 3 是我们第一个完全基于该原则构建的模型，也是我们开发现实世界视觉智能使命的一个检查点：在物理和数字环境中感知、预测和行动的模型。 内容创建和物理人工智能的早期结果表明这是正确的道路。

FLUX 3：一种型号，多种功能。

FLUX 3 基于 Self-Flow 构建，这是我们在同一底层架构中有效协调多模式生成和理解的方法。 基于这种方法，我们显着扩展了计算和数据资源，以同时跨视频、图像和音频训练 FLUX 3。

自流与流量匹配 (FM)。 左：每种模态的生成误差（Fréchet 距离），每个都标准化为 FM = 100（越低越好）。 右图：通过微调，四个任务组的平均操作任务成功率（越高越好）。

能力和早期评估

因此，FLUX 3 能够混合模态并联合生成图像和视频+音频；无论是纯文本提示还是提供图像和视频等输入参考时。 我们在下面重点介绍该模型的一些关键功能。

Video

FLUX 3 可以在一次生成中创建高度多样化的视频，音频长度可达 20 秒。

其核心功能包括以下内容（所有输出均带有本机音频生成）：

  • 文本到视频的生成。
  • 图像到视频的生成，要么从起始帧（“动画”）继续，要么使用图像作为视觉参考。
  • 从参考剪辑生成视频到视频，将源视频的中心元素（例如相同的角色）携带到新的场景或上下文中。
  • 从输入视频和音频生成视频音频延续。
  • 关键帧到视频的生成，用于定义时刻之间的受控过渡。
  • 多语言对话。
  • 广泛的视觉风格和宽高比，远远超出了传统的电影输出。
  • 将单个剪辑代理链接成更长的多镜头序列。
  • 高风格多样性——FLUX 3 Video 可以轻松处理从偷拍摄像机镜头到动画和电影的各种风格。
  • 强大的排版生成和动画设计。

为了进行下面的初步分析，我们生成了 720p 的 10 秒文本转视频剪辑（带音频）。

评估还处于早期阶段，我们期待进一步的改进

由于模型及其周围的线束仍在开发中，这些结果是初步的，我们预计在早期访问阶段会得到进一步的改进。 在早期评估中，FLUX 3 在高达 69% 的比较中优于 Grok Imagine Video，Kling v3 Pro 为 60%，Happy Horse v1 为 59%，Happy Horse 1.1 为 57%，Seedance 2.0 和 Gemini Omni Flash 为 52%。 FLUX 3 在 77% 的比较中优于 Runway Gen-4.5，在 93% 的比较中优于 Luma Ray 3.2。

虽然仍处于开发阶段，但 FLUX 3 Video 在捕捉人类面部表情、将声音与物理事件关联以及多语言功能方面已经特别强大。 此外，这些功能可以组合起来创建持续几分钟的序列，其中视觉参考有助于确保角色在所有场景中保持一致。

FLUX 3 视频现已在此处提供抢先体验

Image

FLUX 3 可以合成和编辑各种风格、长宽比和分辨率的图像。 在训练中期进行的初步评估中，FLUX 3 已经显示出相对于早期版本的 FLUX 的显着改进：其处理复杂提示和文本生成的能力显着提高。 该模型产生多种输出样式（请参阅以下示例），并且能够以多种语言呈现高精度文本。

与视频评估一样，这些都是初步结果，我们预计在发布之前会有进一步的改进。 我们将在接下来的几周内开放 FLUX 3 Image 的抢先体验阶段。

行动

FLUX 3 的世界理解延伸到了动作预测。 我们采取了两条路线：将原生动作预测直接集成到 FLUX 3 中，扩大我们在 Self-Flow 中的初始工作；并使用预训练的视频主干作为动态感知的基础，可以使用有限的特定于任务的数据来微调专门的动作模型。

其次，模仿机器人是最早获得 FLUX 3 早期使用权的合作伙伴之一。 我们共同开发了 FLUX-mimic，这是一种视频动作模型，将 FLUX 3 骨干与 mimic 在机器人学习方面的专业知识相结合，以实现灵巧的操作和生产部署。 阅读我们的论文，了解为什么物理人工智能和内容创建在同一基础上运行，以及如何在奥迪的实际生产任务中对其进行测试。

推出计划

在接下来的几周和几个月内，我们将在早期访问阶段之后提供以下功能，以确保顺利推出、收集反馈和严格的安全测试。 所有功能均基于相同的底层多模式流量匹配模型构建。 这些功能和模型包括：

  • 通过 API 和私人权重访问生成和编辑视频和音频。 （“FLUX 3 视频”）
  • 通过选定的研究和商业合作伙伴进行动作预测，从模仿机器人开始（“FLUX-mimic 和 FLUX 3 Action”）
  • 通过 API 和私有权重访问进行图像合成和编辑。 （“FLUX 3 图像”）
  • 对多模式骨干网的开放权重访问，用于内容创建（视频、音频和图像）和动作预测。 （“FLUX 3 开发”）

我们还将发布有关底层方法的更多技术细节。

在此请求提前访问

接下来是什么？

我们才刚刚开始触及多功能、强大、统一的多式联运模型及其功能的表面。 从交互式图像和视频编辑、模拟到计算机使用和物理人工智能，前沿是广阔的。 在我们逐步推出这些新功能的同时，我们已经在开发下一代模型。 我们的目标是将感知、动作和语言预测统一在同一个统一模型中。

如果您有兴趣使用 FLUX 3 进行探索和构建，请在此处联系。 如果您有兴趣为我们的使命做出贡献，请加入我们！ 我们正在德国和美国招聘。
